steps.title: Compare the means
steps.content:
Data set A has nine $6$s, so its mean is $6$. Data set B has nine $6$s and one $90$:
$$\frac{9\cdot6+90}{10}=\frac{144}{10}=14.4$$
The means are different.

steps.title: Compare the medians
steps.content: Data set A has median $6$ because all values are $6$. Data set B, in order, has nine $6$s followed by $90$, so the middle two values are both $6$. Its median is also $6$. Only the means are different. The answer is A.
